{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019CQXXj6brJLvga9XRN2aGo","type":"tool_result","content":[{"type":"text","text":"{\"issues\":[{\"number\":53476,\"title\":\"Mistral provider returns 422 Unprocessable Entity for all models using openai-completions adapter\",\"body\":\"# OpenClaw Issue: Mistral Provider 422 Error\\n\\n## 问题概述\\n\\n当使用 OpenClaw 内置的 `openai-completions` 适配器调用 Mistral API 时，所有 Mistral 模型均返回 **422 Unprocessable Entity** 错误。而直接使用 `curl` 调用同一 API endpoint 则完全正常。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 环境信息\\n\\n- **OpenClaw 版本**: 2026.3.23-1\\n- **操作系统**: Windows 10 (build 26200) x64\\n- **Node.js**: v22.22.1\\n- **代理**: HTTP_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7897 (Clash Verge)\\n- **配置路径**: `C:\\\\Users\\\\liuq\\\\.openclaw\\\\openclaw.json`\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 配置详情\\n\\n### providers.mistral\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\u0026#34;baseUrl\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;https://api.mistral.ai/v1\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;apiKey\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;nG4eFs1KpoY8ME1TMVBtEj5F6fQu3mKn\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;api\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;openai-completions\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;models\\u0026#34;: [\\n    { \\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral-large-latest\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;name\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Mistral Large\\u0026#34;, ... },\\n    { \\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;name\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;, ... },\\n    { \\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;magistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;name\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;magistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;, ... }\\n  ]\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### agents.defaults.model\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\u0026#34;primary\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral/mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;fallbacks\\u0026#34;: [\\n    \\u0026#34;mistral/mistral-large-latest\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;mistral/magistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;nvidia/minimaxai/minimax-m2.1\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;openrouter/nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;openrouter/stepfun/step-3.5-flash:free\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;qtcool/MiniMax-M2.7\\u0026#34;\\n  ]\\n}\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 复现步骤\\n\\n1. 将 `mistral-small-latest` 设为 primary 模型\\n2. 重启网关：`openclaw gateway restart`\\n3. 发送任意消息触发模型调用\\n4. 观察日志中的错误\\n\\n### 日志片段\\n```\\n{\\u0026#34;event\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;embedded_run_agent_end\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;error\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;422 status code (no body)\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;provider\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;mistral\\u0026#34;}\\n{\\u0026#34;event\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;model_fallback_decision\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;reason\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;rate_limit\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;status\\u0026#34;:429}  // mistral-large-latest\\n{\\u0026#34;event\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;embedded_run_agent_end\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;error\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;422 status code (no body)\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;magistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;provider\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;mistral\\u0026#34;}\\n// 最终 fallback 到 stepfun/step-3.5-flash:free\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 对比：直接 API 调用（成功）\\n\\n```bash\\ncurl -x http://127.0.0.1:7897 \\\\\\n  -X POST \\u0026#34;https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions\\u0026#34; \\\\\\n  -H \\u0026#34;Authorization: Bearer nG4eFs1KpoY8ME1TMVBtEj5F6fQu3mKn\\u0026#34; \\\\\\n  -H \\u0026#34;Content-Type: application/json\\u0026#34; \\\\\\n  -d \\u0026#39;{\\u0026#34;messages\\u0026#34;:[{\\u0026#34;role\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;user\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;content\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;一二三四五\\u0026#34;}],\\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;max_tokens\\u0026#34;:10}\\u0026#39;\\n```\\n\\n**响应** (200 OK):\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;xxx\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;choices\\u0026#34;: [{\\n    \\u0026#34;message\\u0026#34;: {\\u0026#34;content\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;你好！测试成功😊\\u0026#34;}\\n  }]\\n}\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 测试的 Mistral 模型\\n\\n| 模型 | 直接调用 | OpenClaw provider |\\n|------|----------|-------------------|\\n| mistral-small-latest | ✅ | ❌ 422 |\\n| mistral-medium-latest | ✅ | ❌ 422 (预期) |\\n| mistral-large-latest | ✅ | ❌ 429 (rate limit after 422 attempts) |\\n| codestral-latest | ✅ | ❌ 422 (预期) |\\n| magistral-small-latest | ✅ | ❌ 422 |\\n\\n**结论**：所有 Mistral 模型在 provider 中均失败，问题具有普遍性。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 推测原因\\n\\nOpenClaw 的 `openai-completions` 适配器在构造请求时，可能包含了 Mistral API 不接受的字段，例如：\\n\\n- `logit_bias`\\n- `logprobs` / `top_logprobs`\\n- `user` (OpenAI 特有)\\n- 或其他 OpenAI 特定扩展参数\\n\\nMistral API 虽然兼容 OpenAI 协议，但对参数验证更严格，某些字段会直接导致 422 错误。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 期望的修复\\n\\n方案A（推荐）：为 `mistral` provider 添加 `allowedParameters` 配置，允许用户过滤请求参数：\\n```json\\n\\u0026#34;providers\\u0026#34;: {\\n  \\u0026#34;mistral\\u0026#34;: {\\n    \\u0026#34;allowedParameters\\u0026#34;: [\\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;messages\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;max_tokens\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;temperature\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;top_p\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;stream\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;stop\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;random_seed\\u0026#34;, ...]\\n  }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n方案B：修改 `openai-completions` 适配器，检测 provider 类型并自动排除不支持的字段。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 临时工作around\\n\\n1. 继续使用其他 provider（如 stepfun）\\n2. 直接通过 curl/脚本调用 Mistral API\\n3. 创建自定义 skill 封装调用（已验证可行）\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 附加信息\\n\\n- OpenClaw 配置热重载正常，`mistral-small-latest` 已在 `agents.defaults.models` 中注册\\n- 代理配置正确（HTTP_PROXY）\\n- API Key 有效（有足够配额）\\n- 问题仅在 `openai-completions` 适配器中出现\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Issue 优先级**: 中高（影响使用 Mistral 模型的能力）\\n**预计修复难度**: 低（参数过滤逻辑）\",\"state\":\"OPEN\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"strategypay\"},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-24T06:46:26Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-24T06:46:26Z\"}],\"totalCount\":22213,\"pageInfo\":{\"hasNextPage\":true,\"hasPreviousPage\":false,\"startCursor\":\"Y3Vyc29yOnYyOpK5MjAyNi0wMy0yM1QyMzo0NjoyNi0wNzowMM716Imf\",\"endCursor\":\"Y3Vyc29yOnYyOpK5MjAyNi0wMy0yM1QyMzo0NjoyNi0wNzowMM716Imf\"}}"}]}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"52f40b0c-5f6f-42f7-8c38-cceb86cbe1b6","uuid":"0c10f5eb-7768-4dc1-a70e-0f9ef0563dc0","timestamp":"2026-03-24T06:48:31.595Z","tool_use_result":[{"type":"text","text":"{\"issues\":[{\"number\":53476,\"title\":\"Mistral {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012hf3nuwJ7xo2dJHJsWj75n","type":"tool_result","content":[{"type":"text","text":"{\"number\":53476,\"title\":\"Mistral provider returns 422 Unprocessable Entity for all models using openai-completions adapter\",\"body\":\"# OpenClaw Issue: Mistral Provider 422 Error\\n\\n## 问题概述\\n\\n当使用 OpenClaw 内置的 `openai-completions` 适配器调用 Mistral API 时，所有 Mistral 模型均返回 **422 Unprocessable Entity** 错误。而直接使用 `curl` 调用同一 API endpoint 则完全正常。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 环境信息\\n\\n- **OpenClaw 版本**: 2026.3.23-1\\n- **操作系统**: Windows 10 (build 26200) x64\\n- **Node.js**: v22.22.1\\n- **代理**: HTTP_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7897 (Clash Verge)\\n- **配置路径**: `C:\\\\Users\\\\liuq\\\\.openclaw\\\\openclaw.json`\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 配置详情\\n\\n### providers.mistral\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\u0026#34;baseUrl\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;https://api.mistral.ai/v1\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;apiKey\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;nG4eFs1KpoY8ME1TMVBtEj5F6fQu3mKn\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;api\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;openai-completions\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;models\\u0026#34;: [\\n    { \\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral-large-latest\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;name\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Mistral Large\\u0026#34;, ... },\\n    { \\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;name\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;, ... },\\n    { \\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;magistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;name\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;magistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;, ... }\\n  ]\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### agents.defaults.model\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\u0026#34;primary\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral/mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;fallbacks\\u0026#34;: [\\n    \\u0026#34;mistral/mistral-large-latest\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;mistral/magistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;nvidia/minimaxai/minimax-m2.1\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;openrouter/nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;openrouter/stepfun/step-3.5-flash:free\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;qtcool/MiniMax-M2.7\\u0026#34;\\n  ]\\n}\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 复现步骤\\n\\n1. 将 `mistral-small-latest` 设为 primary 模型\\n2. 重启网关：`openclaw gateway restart`\\n3. 发送任意消息触发模型调用\\n4. 观察日志中的错误\\n\\n### 日志片段\\n```\\n{\\u0026#34;event\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;embedded_run_agent_end\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;error\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;422 status code (no body)\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;provider\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;mistral\\u0026#34;}\\n{\\u0026#34;event\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;model_fallback_decision\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;reason\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;rate_limit\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;status\\u0026#34;:429}  // mistral-large-latest\\n{\\u0026#34;event\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;embedded_run_agent_end\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;error\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;422 status code (no body)\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;magistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;provider\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;mistral\\u0026#34;}\\n// 最终 fallback 到 stepfun/step-3.5-flash:free\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 对比：直接 API 调用（成功）\\n\\n```bash\\ncurl -x http://127.0.0.1:7897 \\\\\\n  -X POST \\u0026#34;https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions\\u0026#34; \\\\\\n  -H \\u0026#34;Authorization: Bearer nG4eFs1KpoY8ME1TMVBtEj5F6fQu3mKn\\u0026#34; \\\\\\n  -H \\u0026#34;Content-Type: application/json\\u0026#34; \\\\\\n  -d \\u0026#39;{\\u0026#34;messages\\u0026#34;:[{\\u0026#34;role\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;user\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;content\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;一二三四五\\u0026#34;}],\\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;max_tokens\\u0026#34;:10}\\u0026#39;\\n```\\n\\n**响应** (200 OK):\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;xxx\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;choices\\u0026#34;: [{\\n    \\u0026#34;message\\u0026#34;: {\\u0026#34;content\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;你好！测试成功😊\\u0026#34;}\\n  }]\\n}\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 测试的 Mistral 模型\\n\\n| 模型 | 直接调用 | OpenClaw provider |\\n|------|----------|-------------------|\\n| mistral-small-latest | ✅ | ❌ 422 |\\n| mistral-medium-latest | ✅ | ❌ 422 (预期) |\\n| mistral-large-latest | ✅ | ❌ 429 (rate limit after 422 attempts) |\\n| codestral-latest | ✅ | ❌ 422 (预期) |\\n| magistral-small-latest | ✅ | ❌ 422 |\\n\\n**结论**：所有 Mistral 模型在 provider 中均失败，问题具有普遍性。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 推测原因\\n\\nOpenClaw 的 `openai-completions` 适配器在构造请求时，可能包含了 Mistral API 不接受的字段，例如：\\n\\n- `logit_bias`\\n- `logprobs` / `top_logprobs`\\n- `user` (OpenAI 特有)\\n- 或其他 OpenAI 特定扩展参数\\n\\nMistral API 虽然兼容 OpenAI 协议，但对参数验证更严格，某些字段会直接导致 422 错误。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 期望的修复\\n\\n方案A（推荐）：为 `mistral` provider 添加 `allowedParameters` 配置，允许用户过滤请求参数：\\n```json\\n\\u0026#34;providers\\u0026#34;: {\\n  \\u0026#34;mistral\\u0026#34;: {\\n    \\u0026#34;allowedParameters\\u0026#34;: [\\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;messages\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;max_tokens\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;temperature\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;top_p\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;stream\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;stop\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;random_seed\\u0026#34;, ...]\\n  }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n方案B：修改 `openai-completions` 适配器，检测 provider 类型并自动排除不支持的字段。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 临时工作around\\n\\n1. 继续使用其他 provider（如 stepfun）\\n2. 直接通过 curl/脚本调用 Mistral API\\n3. 创建自定义 skill 封装调用（已验证可行）\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 附加信息\\n\\n- OpenClaw 配置热重载正常，`mistral-small-latest` 已在 `agents.defaults.models` 中注册\\n- 代理配置正确（HTTP_PROXY）\\n- API Key 有效（有足够配额）\\n- 问题仅在 `openai-completions` 适配器中出现\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Issue 优先级**: 中高（影响使用 Mistral 模型的能力）\\n**预计修复难度**: 低（参数过滤逻辑）\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53476\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"strategypay\",\"id\":206508628,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/strategypay\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/206508628?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"NONE\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":0,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":0},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-24T06:46:26Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-24T06:46:26Z\"}"}]}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"52f40b0c-5f6f-42f7-8c38-cceb86cbe1b6","uuid":"86582441-472a-4c0e-aae2-70ca80b6f41a","timestamp":"2026-03-24T06:49:24.791Z","tool_use_result":[{"type":"text","text":"{\"number\":53476,\"title\":\"Mistral provider returns 422 Unprocessable Entity for all models using openai-completions adapter\",\"body\":\"# OpenClaw Issue: Mistral Provider 422 Error\\n\\n## 问题概述\\n\\n当使用 OpenClaw 内置的 `openai-completions` 适配器调用 Mistral API 时，所有 Mistral 模型均返回 **422 Unprocessable Entity** 错误。而直接使用 `curl` 调用同一 API endpoint 则完全正常。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 环境信息\\n\\n- **OpenClaw 版本**: 2026.3.23-1\\n- **操作系统**: Windows 10 (build 26200) x64\\n- **Node.js**: v22.22.1\\n- **代理**: HTTP_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7897 (Clash Verge)\\n- **配置路径**: `C:\\\\Users\\\\liuq\\\\.openclaw\\\\openclaw.json`\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 配置详情\\n\\n### providers.mistral\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\u0026#34;baseUrl\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;https://api.mistral.ai/v1\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;apiKey\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;nG4eFs1KpoY8ME1TMVBtEj5F6fQu3mKn\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;api\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;openai-completions\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;models\\u0026#34;: [\\n    { \\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral-large-latest\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;name\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;Mistral Large\\u0026#34;, ... },\\n    { \\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;name\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;, ... },\\n    { \\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;magistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;name\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;magistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;, ... }\\n  ]\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### agents.defaults.model\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\u0026#34;primary\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral/mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;fallbacks\\u0026#34;: [\\n    \\u0026#34;mistral/mistral-large-latest\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;mistral/magistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;nvidia/minimaxai/minimax-m2.1\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;openrouter/nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;openrouter/stepfun/step-3.5-flash:free\\u0026#34;,\\n    \\u0026#34;qtcool/MiniMax-M2.7\\u0026#34;\\n  ]\\n}\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 复现步骤\\n\\n1. 将 `mistral-small-latest` 设为 primary 模型\\n2. 重启网关：`openclaw gateway restart`\\n3. 发送任意消息触发模型调用\\n4. 观察日志中的错误\\n\\n### 日志片段\\n```\\n{\\u0026#34;event\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;embedded_run_agent_end\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;error\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;422 status code (no body)\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;provider\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;mistral\\u0026#34;}\\n{\\u0026#34;event\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;model_fallback_decision\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;reason\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;rate_limit\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;status\\u0026#34;:429}  // mistral-large-latest\\n{\\u0026#34;event\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;embedded_run_agent_end\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;error\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;422 status code (no body)\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;magistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;provider\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;mistral\\u0026#34;}\\n// 最终 fallback 到 stepfun/step-3.5-flash:free\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 对比：直接 API 调用（成功）\\n\\n```bash\\ncurl -x http://127.0.0.1:7897 \\\\\\n  -X POST \\u0026#34;https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions\\u0026#34; \\\\\\n  -H \\u0026#34;Authorization: Bearer nG4eFs1KpoY8ME1TMVBtEj5F6fQu3mKn\\u0026#34; \\\\\\n  -H \\u0026#34;Content-Type: application/json\\u0026#34; \\\\\\n  -d \\u0026#39;{\\u0026#34;messages\\u0026#34;:[{\\u0026#34;role\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;user\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;content\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;一二三四五\\u0026#34;}],\\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;:\\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\u0026#34;max_tokens\\u0026#34;:10}\\u0026#39;\\n```\\n\\n**响应** (200 OK):\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;xxx\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;mistral-small-latest\\u0026#34;,\\n  \\u0026#34;choices\\u0026#34;: [{\\n    \\u0026#34;message\\u0026#34;: {\\u0026#34;content\\u0026#34;: \\u0026#34;你好！测试成功😊\\u0026#34;}\\n  }]\\n}\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 测试的 Mistral 模型\\n\\n| 模型 | 直接调用 | OpenClaw provider |\\n|------|----------|-------------------|\\n| mistral-small-latest | ✅ | ❌ 422 |\\n| mistral-medium-latest | ✅ | ❌ 422 (预期) |\\n| mistral-large-latest | ✅ | ❌ 429 (rate limit after 422 attempts) |\\n| codestral-latest | ✅ | ❌ 422 (预期) |\\n| magistral-small-latest | ✅ | ❌ 422 |\\n\\n**结论**：所有 Mistral 模型在 provider 中均失败，问题具有普遍性。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 推测原因\\n\\nOpenClaw 的 `openai-completions` 适配器在构造请求时，可能包含了 Mistral API 不接受的字段，例如：\\n\\n- `logit_bias`\\n- `logprobs` / `top_logprobs`\\n- `user` (OpenAI 特有)\\n- 或其他 OpenAI 特定扩展参数\\n\\nMistral API 虽然兼容 OpenAI 协议，但对参数验证更严格，某些字段会直接导致 422 错误。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 期望的修复\\n\\n方案A（推荐）：为 `mistral` provider 添加 `allowedParameters` 配置，允许用户过滤请求参数：\\n```json\\n\\u0026#34;providers\\u0026#34;: {\\n  \\u0026#34;mistral\\u0026#34;: {\\n    \\u0026#34;allowedParameters\\u0026#34;: [\\u0026#34;model\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;messages\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;max_tokens\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;temperature\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;top_p\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;stream\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;stop\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;random_seed\\u0026#34;, ...]\\n  }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n方案B：修改 `openai-completions` 适配器，检测 provider 类型并自动排除不支持的字段。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 临时工作around\\n\\n1. 继续使用其他 provider（如 stepfun）\\n2. 直接通过 curl/脚本调用 Mistral API\\n3. 创建自定义 skill 封装调用（已验证可行）\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 附加信息\\n\\n- OpenClaw 配置热重载正常，`mistral-small-latest` 已在 `agents.defaults.models` 中注册\\n- 代理配置正确（HTTP_PROXY）\\n- API Key 有效（有足够配额）\\n- 问题仅在 `openai-completions` 适配器中出现\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Issue 优先级**: 中高（影响使用 Mistral 模型的能力）\\n**预计修复难度**: 低（参数过滤逻辑）\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53476\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"strategypay\",\"id\":206508628,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/strategypay\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/206508628?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"NONE\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":0,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":0},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-24T06:46:26Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-24T06:46:26Z\"}"}]}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HFZ4tWm8SYv5AcARce3eZH","type":"tool_result","content":[{"type":"text","text":"{\"total_count\":7682,\"incomplete_results\":false,\"items\":[{\"id\":4125596242,\"number\":53466,\"state\":\"open\",\"locked\":false,\"title\":\"[Bug]: Expired external Codex credentials overwrite fresh re-auth and cause repeated OAuth failures\",\"body\":\"### Bug type\\n\\nBehavior bug (incorrect output/state without crash)\\n\\n### Summary\\n\\nI hit a failure mode where expired external Codex credentials appear to overwrite newly completed OpenClaw auth flows.\\n\\nIn my case, this was not limited to onboarding/configure. Even after running:\\n\\n`openclaw models auth login`\\n\\nThe old credential would come back again, and later runtime usage failed with:\\n\\n`OAuth token refresh failed for openai-codex: Failed to refresh OAuth token for openai-codex. Please try again or re-authenticate.`\\n\\nSo the issue is not just that stale external credentials can be imported once — it is that they seem able to replace fresh re-auth state afterward, making Codex auth effectively impossible to recover from on the user side.\\n\\n### Steps to reproduce\\n\\n1. Ensure an expired Codex external credential file exists at ~/.codex/auth.json.\\n2. Start OpenClaw 2026.3.23-2 with Codex configured as the primary model.\\n3. Run either onboarding/configure or openclaw models auth login.\\n4. Observe the log line when onboarding(won't be shown when auth login):\\n` [agents/auth-profiles] synced openai-codex credentials from external cli`\\n5. Trigger actual Codex model usage.\\n6. Observe the runtime failure:OAuth token refresh failed for openai-codex: \\n`Failed to refresh OAuth token for openai-codex. Please try again or re-authenticate.`\\n7. Remove ~/.codex/, retry the same flow, and observe that the failure no longer occurs.\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\n\\nExpected result: after completing a fresh OpenClaw Codex auth flow, OpenClaw should keep the newly issued credential and Codex should remain usable at runtime. In this same environment, that was the observed behavior after removing `~/.codex/`: `openai-codex:default` showed `ok expires in 10d`, the primary model was restored to `openai-codex/gpt-5.4`, and the repeated OAuth refresh failure stopped.\\n\\n### Actual behavior\\n\\nObserved result: after re-running onboarding/configure or `openclaw models auth login`, Codex later failed at runtime with the user-visible error:\\n\\n```text\\n⚠️ Agent failed before reply: OAuth token refresh failed for openai-codex: Failed to refresh OAuth token for openai-codex. Please try again or re-authenticate.\\nLogs: openclaw logs --follow\\n```\\n\\nSupporting evidence observed in logs/status:\\n\\n- Gateway logs showed:\\n  ```text\\n  [agents/auth-profiles] synced openai-codex credentials from external cli\\n  ```\\n- `openclaw models status` previously showed repeated refresh failures such as:\\n  ```text\\n  [openai-codex] Token refresh failed: 401\\n  \\\"code\\\": \\\"refresh_token_reused\\\"\\n  ```\\n- The stale external credential source was found at:\\n  ```text\\n  ~/.codex/auth.json\\n  ```\\n\\n### OpenClaw version\\n\\n2026.3.23-2\\n\\n### Operating system\\n\\nmacOS 26.3.1 (a)\\n\\n### Install method\\n\\npnpm\\n\\n### Model\\n\\ngpt-5.4\\n\\n### Provider / routing chain\\n\\nopenclaw -\\u003e openai-codex\\n\\n### Additional provider/model setup details\\n\\n_No response_\\n\\n### Logs, screenshots, and evidence\\n\\n```shell\\n\\n```\\n\\n### Impact and severity\\n\\n_No response_\\n\\n### Additional information\\n\\n_No response_\",\"author_association\":\"NONE\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"Hantaison\",\"id\":185837628,\"node_id\":\"U_kgDOCxOoPA\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/185837628?v=4\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Hantaison\",\"gravatar_id\":\"\",\"type\":\"User\",\"site_admin\":false,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison\",\"events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/events{/privacy}\",\"following_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/following{/other_user}\",\"followers_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/followers\",\"gists_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/gists{/gist_id}\",\"organizations_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/orgs\",\"received_events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/received_events\",\"repos_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/repos\",\"starred_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/starred{/owner}{/repo}\",\"subscriptions_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/subscriptions\"},\"labels\":[{\"id\":9706244967,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/labels/bug\",\"name\":\"bug\",\"color\":\"d73a4a\",\"description\":\"Something isn't crash\",\"default\":false,\"node_id\":\"LA_kwDOQb6kR88AAAACZxxN7g\"}],\"comments\":0,\"created_at\":\"2026-03-24T06:31:42Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-24T06:31:51Z\",\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53466\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53466\",\"comments_url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53466/comments\",\"events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53466/events\",\"labels_url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53466/labels{/name}\",\"repository_url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":0,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":0,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53466/reactions\"},\"node_id\":\"I_kwDOQb6kR87155pS\"}]}"}]}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"52f40b0c-5f6f-42f7-8c38-cceb86cbe1b6","uuid":"979dc236-86bc-48fc-8d26-03f9c354a3a9","timestamp":"2026-03-24T06:49:35.531Z","tool_use_result":[{"type":"text","text":"{\"total_count\":7682,\"incomplete_results\":false,\"items\":[{\"id\":4125596242,\"number\":53466,\"state\":\"open\",\"locked\":false,\"title\":\"[Bug]: Expired external Codex credentials overwrite fresh re-auth and cause repeated OAuth failures\",\"body\":\"### Bug type\\n\\nBehavior bug (incorrect output/state without crash)\\n\\n### Summary\\n\\nI hit a failure mode where expired external Codex credentials appear to overwrite newly completed OpenClaw auth flows.\\n\\nIn my case, this was not limited to onboarding/configure. Even after running:\\n\\n`openclaw models auth login`\\n\\nThe old credential would come back again, and later runtime usage failed with:\\n\\n`OAuth token refresh failed for openai-codex: Failed to refresh OAuth token for openai-codex. Please try again or re-authenticate.`\\n\\nSo the issue is not just that stale external credentials can be imported once — it is that they seem able to replace fresh re-auth state afterward, making Codex auth effectively impossible to recover from on the user side.\\n\\n### Steps to reproduce\\n\\n1. Ensure an expired Codex external credential file exists at ~/.codex/auth.json.\\n2. Start OpenClaw 2026.3.23-2 with Codex configured as the primary model.\\n3. Run either onboarding/configure or openclaw models auth login.\\n4. Observe the log line when onboarding(won't be shown when auth login):\\n` [agents/auth-profiles] synced openai-codex credentials from external cli`\\n5. Trigger actual Codex model usage.\\n6. Observe the runtime failure:OAuth token refresh failed for openai-codex: \\n`Failed to refresh OAuth token for openai-codex. Please try again or re-authenticate.`\\n7. Remove ~/.codex/, retry the same flow, and observe that the failure no longer occurs.\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\n\\nExpected result: after completing a fresh OpenClaw Codex auth flow, OpenClaw should keep the newly issued credential and Codex should remain usable at runtime. In this same environment, that was the observed behavior after removing `~/.codex/`: `openai-codex:default` showed `ok expires in 10d`, the primary model was restored to `openai-codex/gpt-5.4`, and the repeated OAuth refresh failure stopped.\\n\\n### Actual behavior\\n\\nObserved result: after re-running onboarding/configure or `openclaw models auth login`, Codex later failed at runtime with the user-visible error:\\n\\n```text\\n⚠️ Agent failed before reply: OAuth token refresh failed for openai-codex: Failed to refresh OAuth token for openai-codex. Please try again or re-authenticate.\\nLogs: openclaw logs --follow\\n```\\n\\nSupporting evidence observed in logs/status:\\n\\n- Gateway logs showed:\\n  ```text\\n  [agents/auth-profiles] synced openai-codex credentials from external cli\\n  ```\\n- `openclaw models status` previously showed repeated refresh failures such as:\\n  ```text\\n  [openai-codex] Token refresh failed: 401\\n  \\\"code\\\": \\\"refresh_token_reused\\\"\\n  ```\\n- The stale external credential source was found at:\\n  ```text\\n  ~/.codex/auth.json\\n  ```\\n\\n### OpenClaw version\\n\\n2026.3.23-2\\n\\n### Operating system\\n\\nmacOS 26.3.1 (a)\\n\\n### Install method\\n\\npnpm\\n\\n### Model\\n\\ngpt-5.4\\n\\n### Provider / routing chain\\n\\nopenclaw -\\u003e openai-codex\\n\\n### Additional provider/model setup details\\n\\n_No response_\\n\\n### Logs, screenshots, and evidence\\n\\n```shell\\n\\n```\\n\\n### Impact and severity\\n\\n_No response_\\n\\n### Additional information\\n\\n_No response_\",\"author_association\":\"NONE\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"Hantaison\",\"id\":185837628,\"node_id\":\"U_kgDOCxOoPA\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/185837628?v=4\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Hantaison\",\"gravatar_id\":\"\",\"type\":\"User\",\"site_admin\":false,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison\",\"events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/events{/privacy}\",\"following_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/following{/other_user}\",\"followers_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/followers\",\"gists_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/gists{/gist_id}\",\"organizations_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/orgs\",\"received_events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/received_events\",\"repos_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/repos\",\"starred_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/starred{/owner}{/repo}\",\"subscriptions_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Hantaison/subscriptions\"},\"labels\":[{\"id\":9706244967,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/labels/bug\",\"name\":\"bug\",\"color\":\"d73a4a\",\"description\":\"Something isn't working\",\"default\":true,\"node_id\":\"LA_kwDOQb6kR88AAAACQomLZw\"},{\"id\":10319842798,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/labels/bug:behavior\",\"name\":\"bug:behavior\",\"color\":\"D73A4A\",\"description\":\"Incorrect crash\",\"default\":false,\"node_id\":\"LA_kwDOQb6kR88AAAACZxxN7g\"}],\"comments\":0,\"created_at\":\"2026-03-24T06:31:42Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-24T06:31:51Z\",\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53466\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53466\",\"comments_url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53466/comments\",\"events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53466/events\",\"labels_url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53466/labels{/name}\",\"repository_url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":0,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":0,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/issues/53466/reactions\"},\"node_id\":\"I_kwDOQb6kR87155pS\"}]}"}]}
